gaps: AC-1: health flags used hardcoded options instead of customer_health_question_os; both steps lacked data-bubble-id/bubbleStyle IR hierarchy
AC-2: only recovery_mode_active/grief_mode_active mapped; health_flag3–6 and load_signal_* custom states not persisted
AC-3: completion logic inline in Onboarding.tsx without dedicated completeOnboarding flow or bTHDT route constant

evidence: frontend/src/components/OnboardingHealthFlags.tsx — HEALTH_FLAG_OPTIONS multi-select with none-of-the-above exclusivity via toggleHealthFlagSelection
frontend/src/components/OnboardingLoadSignals.tsx — LOAD_SIGNAL_QUESTIONS single-select per question group with allAnswered gate
frontend/src/lib/enums/onboardingQuestions.ts — HEALTH_FLAG_OPTIONS customStateKey maps health_recovery_mode_active, health_grief_mode_active, health_flag3–6, health_none_of_the_above
frontend/src/pages/Onboarding.tsx — persistOnboardingDraft on load and health steps merges custom state payloads into onboarding_data

frontend/src/lib/completeOnboarding.ts — canCompleteOnboarding validates required signals; completeOnboarding saves profile with onboarding_completed and navigates to ONBOARDING_COMPLETE_ROUTE (/dashboard, bTHDT)
frontend/src/pages/Onboarding.tsx — OnboardingResults onComplete delegates to completeOnboarding

ui_evidence.note: Route target via ONBOARDING_COMPLETE_DESTINATION_BUBBLE_ID in completeOnboarding.ts
